name: Windlass Bola
description:
Clockwork mechanisms tick away inside the weights of these +1 striking returning bolas, spooling out more cord in midair.

Activate 1 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect The cord of the bola snakes out as you throw it, allowing the weapon to wrap around a group of enemies. You use the bolas to attempt a ranged against all creatures in a within the weapon's first range increment. Roll a separate Athletics check for each target. Each attempt counts toward your multiple attack penalty, but don't increase your penalty until you have made all the attempts.
